attributes.action: Teach CPR and life saving skills as a part of the curriculum.
attributes.additional_details: This would save a lot of lives if people know how to deal with the situation. This is with the especially high rise in young people having a cardiac arrest.
attributes.background: Get the government to make it mandatory to teach lifesaving skills such as CPR within schools.

rejection.details:
We are not clear from your petition how you would like the current practice in schools to change. Information about the current practice is available here: https://www.gov.uk/government/publications/relationships-education-relationships-and-sex-education-rse-and-health-education/physical-health-and-mental-wellbeing-primary-and-secondary#by-the-end-of-primary-school

You can start a new petition setting out more clearly how you would like the current practice to change.
